expectations.text: Config file written with valid JSON containing allow_list and disallow_list keys
expectations.evidence: Config written but uses ad hoc schema (kb_root, search.exclude) — not the expected allow_list/disallow_list structure. File also placed at wrong location (.kb/config.json inside /tmp dir, not ~/.kb/config.json)
No allow_list key used. Used kb_root instead, pointing to /tmp/kb-eval-1-without root, not a search path array
Archive path stored under search.exclude, not disallow_list. Different schema entirely — won't interoperate with kb-search script
Created notes/, references/, projects/, archive/ subdirs — but no kb/ subfolder, which is the convention used by the kb skill
